codeReview.summary: The commit correctly addresses the missing interaction by making disconnected Swap/Limit CTAs open WalletSelector instead of being disabled, and it does not regress the existing wallet flow. Navbar connect/disconnect, truncated address display, balance propagation into swap/token-selector, and account-subscription wiring are present in the reviewed code paths.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature metadata and runtime skill availability were out of sync during execution: the worker could not invoke the feature-assigned skill and had to fall back to a different one.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json:434 sets skillName to "frontend-ui-worker"; worker-transcripts.jsonl:49 contains "Skill \"frontend-ui-worker\" not found" and subsequent fallback to "frontend-worker"; handoff skillFeedback.deviations records the same mismatch.

summary: Review passed. The feature implementation in commit 730dd32 fixes the wallet CTA interaction gap and aligns with the wallet integration behavior expected for this milestone, with no blocking or non-blocking code defects found.
